The aesthetic of 2015 is a fascinating blend of various influences, primarily driven by digital culture and social media. This year saw the rise of minimalism as a prominent design ethos, characterized by clean lines, simple color palettes, and an emphasis on functionality. The use of white space became a defining feature of graphic design, creating a sense of calm and clarity.
